creator: dryice@dryice.name
text:
Edwin Groothuis <edwin@FreeBSD.org> wrote:
> Please note that PR ports/106959 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/106959

Thanks for the patch! So quick :) Maintainer approved. Please the
committers commit.

-- 
Dryice @ http://dryice.name

Please avoid sending me Word or PowerPoint attachments.
See http://www.gnu.org/philosophy/sylvester-response.html
